mechanism_narrative: Sustained low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, directly compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points signals abrupt labor market deterioration and recession risk, triggering immediate equity portfolio de-risking and negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to separate bull and bear market transitions in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving corporate revenue growth and generating sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint expansion periods yield negative 60-day forward returns in over 55% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during periods of supply chain bottlenecks signals widening output gaps and margin compression for manufacturers, causing short-term equity sell-offs as investors price in earnings downgrades.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in more than 65% of declining production observations within the specified regime, or the signal exhibits negative predictive power in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month inflation acceleration exceeding 0.6% triggers market expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuation multiples and producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The threshold condition fails to predict negative returns with a win rate above 45%, or Rank IC turns positive during high-inflation episodes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms labor market tightening and wage growth, supporting corporate earnings expansion and generating positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative 60-day returns in over 50% of observations, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in panel regression analysis.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth reflects stronger aggregate economic activity and corporate revenue expansion, leading to positive short-term equity momentum as investors adjust earnings forecasts upward.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in more than 55% of high-GDP-growth quarters, or the signal loses predictive power when controlling for prior market momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production surpassing the 2017 baseline index level indicates capacity utilization recovery and operational leverage, boosting corporate profit margins and generating positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are negative in more than 60% of observations where the threshold is crossed, or the signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark in walk-forward testing.
